atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a right knee injury following a fall while working on his property one week ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with flexion and extension, particularly with pressure applied to the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a palpable pop sensation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain rated as 4-5 out of 10 when mobile.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently taking ibuprofen for swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals tenderness to palpation of the medial aspect of the right knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with flexion and extension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports edema with effusion around the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right knee x-ray was negative for fractures or bony abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure was 150/70 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart rate was 78 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Lungs are clear to auscultation bilaterally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen 800 mg twice daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician continues lisinopril 20 mg daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a knee brace for support

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician recommends icing the knee 20 minutes

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs icing the knee 3-4 times daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans follow-up in one week

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers to nutrition counseling
